case_title: JUANITA POLLARD VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF JUANITA POLLARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SEAMUS MCCULLAGH (CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR) AND BRIAN CAULEY (ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>); REMARKS: MAYOR'S OFFICE STAFF, CARLO BALLARE ACCEPTED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED AUG-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLLARD, JUANITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,000.00, SEE ATTACHMENT 1 (MC-020). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
